content.en:
"There is no one else nearby, only Ye Xingchen alone, with my assassination speed, the full force of the Sixfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor is enough to kill Ye Xingchen in an instant, and then run away, it is absolutely safe!"

He's a silver-level killer, codenamed Indifferent!

Indifferent didn't hesitate to make a move in an instant, and as soon as he made a move, he had accidentally obtained a thousand dao techniques - treacherous thorns!

He didn't practice many Dao techniques, only knew a few Dao techniques, and for countless years, he only specialized in treacherous thorns, and directly cultivated this Zhongqian Dao technique to the peak realm of Dacheng, only one step away from consummation.

The top-notch Dao weapon short sword is combined with the treacherous stab, and it will kill with a fierce blow.

"He's dead!"

Indifference judged by his own experience.

Bang!

The short sword did not pierce Ye Xingchen's body, but stabbed it on a pair of unfamiliar big hands.

"Not good, mission failed!"

The indifference failed to strike, and he fled away in an instant.

However, he couldn't leave!

I saw a figure stop him!

He knew the robe and mask as the Fire King of the Black Wind Mountain.

With a wave of his hand, the Fire King enveloped indifference.

The indifference, which has no life-saving ability, can't stop this terrifying flame Dao technique at all.

Before the consciousness was completely annihilated, the question in the mind of the indifferent mind was: "Who leaked the mission?"

Obviously, the Fire King was specifically protecting Ye Xingchen.

But where is Ye Xingchen qualified to be protected by the Fire King, it must be because someone wants to assassinate Ye Xingchen, so he needs to be protected.

This means that the mission to kill the temple has been leaked!

He didn't know how it was leaked, but he couldn't think about it anymore.

Because he's dead!

Killing a silver-level killer casually is nothing to the Fire King, if it is a Sixfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor with a strong life-saving ability, he may be able to support a move, but just this kind of killer who is only proficient in assassination but not proficient in life-saving, one move is enough to kill the opponent in an instant.

"Thank you, Fire King!"

Ye Xingchen flew over and said gratefully.

It was too dangerous just now, the other party's speed was too fast, and his consciousness seemed to be frozen, and he couldn't react at all.

If that thorn was stabbed on his body, no defense could prevent it, and the forbidden body could not stop it, so it was directly annihilated by a blow, without any chance of survival.

"It's a small thing, the killer is dead, I won't send anyone anymore, I'm leaving!"

The Fire King walked fast and didn't linger long.

He was also very busy, the last time he obtained the Forbidden Fire Lotus Forbidden Treasure, it had already given him a glimmer of hope of stepping into the Invincible Dao Ancestor, so he needed to go back and cultivate and comprehend.

This time, if it weren't for the Wind King's need to avoid suspicion, he was afraid that his identity as the deputy hall master of the Killing God Temple would be exposed, so he didn't dare to participate, otherwise he wouldn't have helped.

The other side.

The Temple of Killing quickly confirmed that the Silver Killer had fallen in apathy, and reversed the mission.

Once the task is revoked, the reward can only be refunded half, this is the rule of the Killing God Temple, and if you want to find the Killing God Temple for help, you must be mentally prepared.

After all, the loss of the Killing God Temple is not small, and a Sixfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor has fallen, if there is no benefit, the Killing God Temple will not be able to open for a long time.

Heavenly Emperor Palace, Feng Family.

The Feng Family's Old Ancestor Long Fei Daozu was very annoyed, and the assassination attempt of the Killing God Temple failed, and the mission was revoked.

"The damn Killing God Temple, it can't even kill a true ancestor, and a silver-level killer has fallen, it's ridiculous!"

It was not that Long Fei Dao Ancestor did not believe in the news of the Killing God Temple, but the success rate of the Sixfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor assassinating a True Ancestor was almost close to one hundred percent.

If the assassination was successful, it would be forgivable if he was not able to escape, but Ye Xingchen was unscathed, and the silver-level killer was killed, what is the matter.

He even suspected that the mission had been leaked, causing Ye Xingchen to be vigilant.

This is the responsibility of the Killing God Temple, but it pits him half of the cost, which is a huge fortune!

But Long Fei Dao Ancestor had no choice but to kill the God Temple, so he could only swallow this bitter fruit himself.

"Forget it, let's do this first, and then take revenge on Ye Xingchen and the human race later!

Long Fei Dao Ancestor comforted himself like this.

The Feng family gave up for the time being, but they didn't know that they had already been exposed.

Terran.

Ye Tian was very annoyed when he learned that his son Ye Xingchen was really assassinated, although he had expected it and there was no danger, but it didn't mean that he wasn't angry.

"Feng family, I'll see you kill you once in the future!"

Ye Tian said coldly.

He didn't retaliate now, after all, the Feng family was on the territory of the Heavenly Emperor Palace, if he dared to kill him, he wouldn't want to come back.

As for asking the Killing Temple to make a move, it's not necessary, the cost is too high, and at most a few people can be killed, what's the use?

-----------------

In a flash, tens of thousands of years have passed.

Since the birth of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, the first major event has occurred.

The first Forbidden Void Realm was born!

This big event has attracted the attention of many big forces, and they have started the idea of this forbidden void realm.

What is the Forbidden Void Realm?

Like the previous Forbidden Forest, Forbidden Mountain Range, and Huoyan Forbidden Land, they all belong to semi-space, overlapping with the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, and these forbidden treasure lands can be seen from the outside.

Although many forbidden and strange things will be born in these forbidden treasure lands, they are not very safe and are not suitable for the headquarters of a force.

But the Forbidden Void Realm is different, he belongs to another Void entirely, and the concealment is very strong, once he occupies a Forbidden Void Realm, he can be used as the headquarters of a force with a little transformation.

And after arranging the large array, it would be difficult for other forces to break through the Forbidden Void Realm.

Other than that.

The rules of the Forbidden Void Realm are very strong, even if it is an invincible Dao Ancestor or even a half-step domain ancestor fighting, it is difficult to destroy the Forbidden Void Realm, and it is enough to withstand the fight of many, many strong people.

The most important point is that the Forbidden Void Realm can be refined, once a Forbidden Void Realm is refined, it is the Realm Master of the Void Realm, mobilizing the power of the Forbidden Void Realm.

At that time, even if the Supreme Dao Ancestor controls the Forbidden Void Realm, he can suppress the Invincible Dao Ancestor.

If the Invincible Dao Ancestor controlled the Forbidden Void Realm, he could even compete with a half-step Domain Ancestor.

What kind of concept is this?

Therefore, there was no force that was not moved by the Forbidden Void Realm and wanted to occupy it.

It is conceivable that any force that occupies the Forbidden Void Realm can basically develop rapidly in the future.

In the past, there was no forbidden void realm in the vast sea realm, so I am afraid that even the Heavenly Emperor Palace would be moved.

As for why the Forbidden Void Realm was discovered, it was because when the Forbidden Void Realm was just born, the space fluctuated greatly, so it would attract the attention of the outside world.

Once the Forbidden Void Realm has stabilized, it will not be easy to discover it.

When the Forbidden Void Realm was discovered, a large number of Dao Ancestors came to the Forbidden Void Realm fluctuation area.

Mitian Sect, Tianhai Sect, Ten Thousand Domains Temple, Black Wind Mountain...... These forces all sent Dao Ancestors one by one.

Even the Heavenly Emperor Palace sent someone at the end!
